title: Diamond Tile Cutting Disc 115mm Cutting Wheel for Cutting and Grinding Porcelain Ceramic Tile Marble Artificial Stone
features: 【Specification】Diameter: 4.5"(115mm); Arbor: 22.23/15.875mm (With a Reducer Washer); Segment Height: 25mm; Thickess: 1.7mm; Grit: #60/70.Please see pictures for more details.

【Application】Suitable for dry and wet cutting of Ceramic tile, Porcelain Tile,Marble, Artificial Stone, etc.Wide range of applications, diverse functions;It can be cut in a straight line or in an angle; It can grind edges and grooves horizontally.

【Why choose us】High quality diamond diamond head and high-strength steel matrix are selected.The saw blade is sharp and wear-resistant;Adopting hot pressing sintering process, the overall hardness is stronger, the toughness is better, and it is more stable and safe.

【Feature】Special hexagonal head design, double-sided 25mm diamond height, fast cutting, neat and smooth cutting and grinding;No spark, less chipping cutting, clean and environmental protection.Both dry and wet, providing higher cost performance and longer service life.
【Machine】Applicable machines: angle grinders, circular saws, etc.Easy to operate.If you have any problem when you use the product, please feel free to contact us for satisfactory customer service.
description: Product Description Product Details Product Details 1 As shown in the picture Product Details 2 As shown in the picture Product Details 3 As shown in the picture Product Details 4 As shown in the picture (packing diagram) High quality tile saw blades Size Arbor: 22.23/15.875mm (With a Reducer Washer); Segment Height: 25mm; Thickess: 1.7mm; Grit: #60/70. Wide range of applications It can grind edges and grooves horizontally for tile,marble，etc. Advanced technology Special hexagonal head design, double-sided 25mm diamond height, fast cutting, neat and smooth cutting and grinding. Cutting effect diagram Less chipping cutting, clean cutting.Both dry and wet, providing higher cost performance and longer service life. FACHLICH:A professional diamond tool manufacturer.
